gene_region.label: ACE2 transcribed interval
gene_region.definition: Canonical ACE2 genomic interval on GRCh37 / hg19 from Ensembl GRCh37 lookup, aligned to the hg19 coordinate system used by this app.

promoter_review_region.label: Operational promoter review window
promoter_review_region.definition: A practical 1 kb upstream window relative to the reverse-strand transcription start, used to flag promoter-adjacent coverage before the canonical gene interval.

promoter_hotspot_region.label: Promoter-associated CpG review window
promoter_hotspot_region.definition: Promoter-proximal CpG-focused span represented by the bundled EPIC subset and used here as the main methylation-review hotspot.

gene_context.gene_summary: ACE2 encodes angiotensin-converting enzyme 2, a membrane carboxypeptidase that converts angiotensin peptides and also serves as an entry receptor for SARS-CoV and SARS-CoV-2 spike proteins.
gene_context.clinical_context: The local ACE2 bundle is cardiopulmonary, vascular, and receptor-biology oriented. ACE2 variants are mostly research-context modifiers unless externally classified and phenotypically anchored.
variant_effect_overview: ACE2 regulatory and coding variants can be studied for expression, peptide balance, cardiovascular traits, or host-pathogen interaction context.
X-linked location, sex, tissue expression, ancestry, and infection/exposure context all matter for interpretation.
gene_context.methylation_interpretation: ACE2 methylation should be treated as local regulatory context around a renin-angiotensin peptide processing, carboxypeptidase activity, cardiopulmonary vascular biology, and viral spike receptor biology gene. Promoter-proximal methylation can support expression-potential review, but it should not replace genotype, RNA, protein, or phenotype data.
methylation_effects: Promoter or first-exon methylation may suggest a more restrained or permissive local expression state for ACE2.
Because ACE2 biology is tissue and pathway dependent, methylation values are context rather than a stand-alone biomarker.

Combined sequence plus methylation findings are most useful when interpreted against renin-angiotensin peptide processing, carboxypeptidase activity, cardiopulmonary vascular biology, and viral spike receptor biology.
methylation_condition_research: Epigenetic regulation studies that use ACE2 promoter or gene-body methylation as expression-context evidence.
Variant-plus-methylation review for renin-angiotensin peptide processing, carboxypeptidase activity, cardiopulmonary vascular biology, and viral spike receptor biology.

evidence.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000130234: ACE2 coordinate source

biorender_visuals.label: ACE2 biochemical figure starter
biorender_visuals.focus: renin-angiotensin peptide processing, carboxypeptidase activity, cardiopulmonary vascular biology, and viral spike receptor biology
biorender_visuals.template_title: Intracellular Layout - Receptor Signaling from Plasma Membrane to Nucleus (2)
biorender_visuals.usage_note: BioRender template and icon-library search results are bundled as figure starters. Open the template link in BioRender, then add or replace the listed icons to make a gene-specific biochemical pathway image.

gene_context.concrete_variant_prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests an ACE2 receptor-peptidase thesis: the individual may carry research context relevant to angiotensin peptide processing, vascular or cardiopulmonary biology, ACE2 expression, or viral spike-receptor interaction studies. This is not a deterministic infection-risk or cardiovascular-risk call.

variant_records.clinical_interpretation: rs2285666 is curated as a ACE2 marker for Renin-angiotensin system biology, Cardiopulmonary and vascular research. Read it through genotype dosage, phenotype context, and the renin-angiotensin peptide processing, carboxypeptidase activity, cardiopulmonary vascular biology, and viral spike receptor biology pathway rather than as a stand-alone deterministic result.
variant_records.clinical_significance: Curated research and clinical-context marker; external clinical classification is required for diagnostic use.
functional_effects: Can modify or tag renin-angiotensin peptide processing, carboxypeptidase activity, cardiopulmonary vascular biology, and viral spike receptor biology.
Best interpreted with tissue, ancestry, phenotype, and assay context.
research_context: Use this marker as a ACE2 pathway-context signal, not as a stand-alone diagnosis.
Sequence, methylation, expression, and protein data may point in different directions and should be reconciled.
variant_records.methylation_interpretation: Pair rs2285666 with ACE2 methylation only as local regulatory context; methylation does not prove the variant's biochemical effect.
